title: MedTech School in Health Technology Innovation
tagline: One-week continuing education programme on MedTech innovation for engineers, researchers, and clinicians.
topics: Medical device design and regulatory pathway
Startup ecosystem and funding for MedTech
description: The MedTech School is a one-week intensive continuing education programme (CEP) co-organised by IC IITP for engineers, medical professionals, researchers, and entrepreneurs interested in health technology innovation. Participants gain hands-on exposure to medical device design, regulatory requirements, clinical validation, and the MedTech startup ecosystem.
